string.text:
SIG-750 – a variant of the Swiss SIG-550 assault rifle, chambered in 7.62x51 NATO. Optimized for marksman use, featuring a longer barrel and a holding grip.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Sights: All Picatinny-compatible, except very low-mounted optics
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: NATO Suppressor
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Grenade Launcher: M209
